audience: Belgian SME owners and marketing teams deciding whether an ageing website needs optimisation, a redesign or a technical rebuild
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's helpen diagnosticeren of hun bestaande website gerichte optimalisatie, een visueel redesign of een technische herbouw nodig heeft

searchIntent.question: When should an SME optimise, redesign or completely rebuild its website?

directAnswer: Redesign your website when its structure, technology or content repeatedly obstructs business goals and targeted improvements no longer solve the underlying problem. Keep and optimise what still works; choose a rebuild only after diagnosing performance, management, content, conversion and SEO risks.
title: When should you redesign your website? Optimise or rebuild
metaDescription: When should you redesign your website? Decide between targeted optimisation, a visual redesign and a rebuild while protecting content, URLs, SEO and measurement.
h1: Redesigning a website: when should you optimise and when should you rebuild?

internalLinks.anchor: one-page website with a full website
building SEO into the website from the start
why a fast website can rank better
complete guide to building a website

factsToPreserve: Website age alone does not determine whether a rebuild is necessary
The article distinguishes targeted optimisation, visual redesign and technical rebuild
SEO migration requires a URL inventory, redirect mapping, canonical checks and monitoring
No ranking or conversion guarantee is introduced
The Gordijnen Myriam image and project context remain unchanged
